title: Open the complete architecture example pack

lesson.goal: Use real artefacts together instead of learning diagrams and documents in isolation.
lesson.outcome: A browser-accessible reference pack for a distributed system.
lesson.challenge: Follow one decision from ASR to ADR, POC, deployment, dashboard, and runbook.

sections.heading: Architecture pack in the browser
sections.content: The complete ParcelFlow pack is available at Open the Architecture Example Pack →. It includes vision, ASRs/NFRs, domain and data ownership, integrations, API/event contracts, risks, resilience, security, observability, capacity, disaster recovery, CI/CD, roadmap, runbooks, and rendered visualisations.
